base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ending_samus_full_body_bikini — a ui (portrait) from 1986 metroid. Full-body Samus-in-leotard portrait — shown as a 'speed-run reward' if game beaten under 1 hour. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Full-body Samus-in-leotard portrait — shown as a 'speed-run reward' if game beaten under 1 hour; earlier unlock tier
